sections.paragraph:
- Original: μακάριος

- Transliteration: Makarios

- Phonetic: mak-ar'-ee-os

- Definition:

1. blessed, happy

- Origin: a prolonged form of the poetical makar (meaning the same)

- TDNT entry: 10:02,5

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: A prolonged form of the poetical μάκαρ makar (meaning the same); supremely blest; by extension fortunate well off: - blessed happy (X -ier).
